title: Steam Machine Behavior
discoveryHint: Craft any steam machine to unlock this page.

sections.text: Steam machines accept steam into an internal tank piped from boilers. They run recipes up to 32 EU/t (LV equivalent) using a proportional amount of steam. The conversion rate is 2 Steam = 1 EU.

After each recipe, steam machines vent cooler steam from their exhaust port (the face with the square pattern). Keep this face unblocked or the machine will stop working. Use a Wrench to change which face the exhaust port is on.
Standing on steam pipes or in front of a venting machine will damage you, so be careful around active setups.
